pageContext.name: Barney Rubble
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Barney Rubble! Based on original references from The Flintstones, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Flintstones fans, don't miss your chance to add Barney Rubble to your Flintstones collection!
